notes: Netherlands are missing pre-tournament absentees Jurriën Timber (groin), Matthijs de Ligt (back surgery), Xavi Simons (ACL), and Teun Schouten, though Dumfries and Brobbey passed late fitness tests and are available; Koeman rotates Micky van de Ven back in at left-back for Nathan Aké. Morocco are without pre-tournament casualties Nayef Aguerd (groin/pubic fracture) and Abde Ezzalzouli (knee), and had fitness concerns over Mazraoui, but he is expected to start; coach Ouahbi brings back Diop…
home_scorers: Brian Brobbey (tournament top scorer with 3 goals, leading striker)
Cody Gakpo (2 World Cup goals in 2026, wide attacker with cutting runs)
Donyell Malen (right-wing starter, direct threat in transition)
away_scorers: Ismael Saibari (tournament's joint-top scorer with 3 goals, spearheads attack)
Achraf Hakimi (1 goal in group stage, marauding full-back, set-piece threat)
Brahim Díaz (2 assists in group stage, creative hub behind the striker)
